calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Daniel R. Stern, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff PARKMERCED OWNER LLC.
Witness Kristine Becker sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendants FANGYUAN OUYANG, AN INDIVIDUAL and HANG TANG, AN INDIVIDUAL.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Notice of Time and Place of Trial and Settlement Hearing
2-Residential Tenancy Agreement
3-Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendants as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 242 Garces Drive, City and County of San Francisco, California 94132.

Damages $3710.00
Holdover damages $15952.94
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $465.00
For a Total Judgment of $20,127.94
Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 1
Judge Pro Tem: Philip Keith, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Owner LLC is present. Represented by Liz Kershaw.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendants Fangyuan Ouyang and Hang Tang are NOT present.
Mandarin Court Interpreter Amanda Peters is present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of January 9, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
